{{Quote|I am Krag of Domain Val. Garqi is mine. Surrender and you live.|Krag Val|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin">''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]''</ref>}}
'''Krag Val''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] stationed on [[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]] early in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]].

==Biography==
[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Shedao Shai]] chose Val to lead a group of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warriors]] that entered the [[Pesktda Xenobotanical Garden]] on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] after [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], [[Ganner Rhysode]] and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] fled there with a group of resistance fighters. He challenged Corran to a fight but Ganner stood in front of him. However [[Mushkil]], a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]], stood in front of Ganner and Krag Val killed him. Ganner tried to engage Krag Val and he cut him in the face with his [[Amphistaff]] leaving a scar. Jacen attacked him and managed to slash him across the chest and knee, disabling him until Corran arrived. By that time the warriors were being suffocated because the [[Bafforr tree|bafforr]] pollen killed their [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|armor]]. Krag Val died in his dead armor.
